steps.title: Use the final claim
steps.content: The passage explains Harris's peer-reviewed rap album, its mix of music and scholarship, and its unusual review process. It ends by saying the album helped redefine how scholarship is created and shared.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: A would compare articles and albums, B would list peer-review steps, and C would present one opinion. The passage instead explains what made this particular album innovative. The answer is D.
